title: Windrush Compensation Scheme data: October 2025
body: "Previous releases are published by the Home Office in the Migration transparency data statistical data set.  This is an Official Statistics publication which provides key statistics relating to the Windrush Compensation Scheme. It includes data on:   number of Windrush Compensation Scheme claims received breakdown of claims by country of residence breakdown of claims by country of nationality number of people referred by the Windrush Compensation Scheme to the claimant assistance provider value of Windrush Compensation Scheme payments made number of negative outcomes volume of tier one and tier two reviews and outcome volumes   The Home Office will update this data on a monthly basis until further notice. "
